data.body: Plan-review gate: PASS (signed, key_id 412fa537, llm_ran=true, 0 blocking). Advisory remediation across 3 review passes: 14 -> 3 advisories. Fixed: P6 ac-quality (removed subjective terms; split compound AC line) now PASSES; added romp-swath-wince->self-waltz-ace ordering edge (applier.py); hardened Bucket-3 AC into per-deliverable checkboxes; added backward-compat + stale-reference-sweep + sequencing sections; added size post-conditions; disambiguated the applier OR-branch. Remaining 3 are accepted: (P5) the veiny-trout/rancid-vane workflow_ops.py pair is sequenced via file_impact + prose since a task->story depends_on promotes degenerately; (E1 0.5) JiraAPIError is fully specified in romp-swath-wince; (COH 0.5) is a positive 'no contradictions' note. SEPARATELY: every review run logs 'container bin [...] FAILED in 0.0s (RuntimeError)' in rebar.llm.plan_review.pass1 — a gate-internal defect under investigation via joe-debug (filed separately).
